generated_oml:
// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "IoT-enabled occupancy sensor deployed in physical building to collect real-time occupancy data. Integrated into BIM model as 'twinnable' device with metadata extracted for runtime configurations (tenant/device IDs, endpoint addresses)."
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDataTransmitted
]

instance TemperatureHumiditySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "IoT-enabled environmental sensor measuring temperature and humidity conditions in real-time. Integrated into BIM model with metadata for runtime configurations via Eclipse Hono/Ditto."
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnvironmentalDataTransmitted
]

instance LuminositySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "IoT-enabled luminosity sensor measuring light levels for adaptive lighting control systems. Data integrated into BIM model for reinforcement learning-based optimization (e.g., BOREALIS project)."
    DTDFVocab:producedData LuminosityDataTransmitted
]

instance EnergyMeter : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "IoT-enabled energy consumption meter tracking real-time energy usage across building systems. Data ingested via Eclipse Hono for synchronization with BIM-based DT model."
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnergyConsumptionDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Interaction (DataTransmitted)
instance OccupancyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Real-time occupancy data transmitted from physical IoT sensors to DT via Eclipse Hono middleware. Validated and normalized before integration into BIM-based model for simulation and analysis."
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]

instance EnvironmentalDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature and humidity data transmitted from IoT sensors to DT using Eclipse Hono/Ditto protocols. Used for environmental condition monitoring and control logic adjustments."
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureHumiditySensor
]

instance LuminosityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Real-time luminosity data transmitted from IoT sensors for adaptive lighting control. Processed via Eclipse Ditto for synchronization with BIM model and reinforcement learning optimization."
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LuminositySensor
]

instance EnergyConsumptionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Real-time energy consumption data transmitted from IoT meters to DT for predictive analytics and optimization. Ingested via Eclipse Hono for bidirectional synchronization."
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EnergyMeter
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance BimModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Semantic backbone of the DT containing geometric, spatial, and functional data of building components. Enriched with runtime metadata (device IDs, control logic) via domain-specific BIM extensions (e.g., Revit, ArchiCAD)."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelDrivenEngineeringEnabler, EclipseHonoEnabler, EclipseDittoEnabler
]

instance RuntimeSensorData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time sensor data (occupancy, environmental conditions, energy consumption) ingested via Eclipse Hono/Ditto. Normalized and processed for integration into BIM-based DT model."
    DTDFVocab:fromData OccupancyDataTransmitted, EnvironmentalDataTransmitted, EnergyConsumptionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHonoEnabler, EclipseDittoEnabler
]

instance ControlLogicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Domain-specific configurations for Building Control Systems (BCS) embedded within BIM (e.g., TwinLight's lighting control semantics). Defines operational attributes and control policies for physical actuators."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelDrivenEngineeringEnabler, EclipseDittoEnabler
]

instance SimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Physics-based or data-driven models for predictive analytics (e.g., energy consumption, thermal performance). Used for simulation and optimization within the DT framework."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo UnrealEngine5Enabler, ReinforcementLearningService
]

instance VisualizationAssets : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "3D models and interactive interfaces generated via Unreal Engine 5 for immersive monitoring and simulation of building operations. Includes real-time data visualization and user interaction capabilities."
    DTDFVocab:fromData RuntimeSensorData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo UnrealEngine5Enabler
]

instance ReinforcementLearningTrainingData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Custom datasets for reinforcement learning services (e.g., BOREALIS project's training data for adaptive lighting optimization). Derived from post-occupancy sensor data and historical performance metrics."
    DTDFVocab:fromData LuminosityDataTransmitted, OccupancyDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ReinforcementLearningService
]

// C11: Enablers
instance ModelDrivenEngineeringEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Automates extraction of domain semantics from BIM models and generates runtime artifacts (middleware configurations, control logic) via model-to-model and model-to-text transformations."
    DTDFVocab:enables AutomatedDeploymentService, ControlLogicConfigurationService
]

instance EclipseHonoEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Provides IoT connectivity and real-time data ingestion for bidirectional communication between physical and virtual systems. Handles sensor data transmission and middleware integration."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeDataIngestionService, BidirectionalCommunicationService
]

instance EclipseDittoEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Manages digital twin instances and their lifecycle, enabling standardized device representation and data exchange. Facilitates runtime synchronization between physical and virtual systems."
    DTDFVocab:enables DigitalTwinLifecycleService
]

instance UnrealEngine5Enabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Delivers rich, interactive 3D visualization for monitoring and simulation of building operations. Supports immersive interfaces for facility managers and engineers."
    DTDFVocab:enables InteractiveVisualizationService, SimulationVisualizationService
]

instance BimToolingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Used by building control engineers to model devices and define control logic within BIM environment (e.g., Revit, ArchiCAD). Provides domain-specific extensions for DT integration."
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelEnrichmentService
]

// C2: Acting Components
instance LightingDimmerActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Building Control System (BCS) actuator for adaptive lighting control. Executes commands generated by DT for energy optimization and visual comfort adjustments."
]

instance HvacDamperActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "HVAC system actuator controlling airflow and temperature via motorized dampers. Receives real-time commands from DT for dynamic energy optimization."
]

instance MotorizedShadeActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Motorized window shades for adaptive solar control. Integrated with DT for reinforcement learning-based optimization of lighting and thermal conditions."
]

// C6: Services
instance RealTimeDataIngestionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Facilitates real-time ingestion of sensor data from physical systems into the DT via Eclipse Hono middleware. Ensures bidirectional synchronization for predictive analytics."
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeMonitoringInsight
]

instance BidirectionalCommunicationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Enables real-time control adjustments between DT and physical systems via Eclipse Hono/Ditto. Supports dynamic reconfiguration of building systems (e.g., adaptive lighting, HVAC)."
    DTDFVocab:provides DynamicControlAdjustmentAction
]

instance DigitalTwinLifecycleService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Manages the lifecycle of digital twin instances using Eclipse Ditto. Provides standardized device representation and data exchange for runtime synchronization."
    DTDFVocab:provides DeviceLifecycleManagementInsight
]

instance InteractiveVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Delivers immersive 3D visualization of building operations via Unreal Engine 5. Enables real-time monitoring and simulation for facility managers."
    DTDFVocab:provides ImmersiveMonitoringInsight
]

instance SimulationVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Provides physics-based or data-driven simulations of building performance (e.g., energy consumption, thermal behavior) for predictive analytics."
    DTDFVocab:provides PredictiveSimulationInsight
]

instance AutomatedDeploymentService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Automates the deployment of DT configurations by scanning BIM models for 'twinnable' devices and generating runtime artifacts for Eclipse Hono/Ditto."
    DTDFVocab:provides DeploymentAutomationInsight
]

instance ControlLogicConfigurationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Configures domain-specific control logic for Building Control Systems within BIM models (e.g., TwinLight's lighting control semantics)."
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlLogicConfigurationInsight
]

instance ModelEnrichmentService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Extends BIM models with runtime metadata (device configurations, control logic) using domain-specific extensions. Validates enriched models for consistency."
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelEnrichmentInsight
]

instance ReinforcementLearningService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Implements reinforcement learning-based optimization for building systems (e.g., adaptive lighting in BOREALIS). Evolves control policies using post-occupancy sensor data."
    DTDFVocab:provides AdaptiveControlPolicyInsight, EnergyOptimizationAction
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance RealTimeMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Live updates on building performance metrics (energy usage, occupant comfort) displayed via Unreal Engine 5 visualization for facility managers."
]

    base:desc "Automated adjustments to building systems (lighting dimmers, HVAC dampers) based on real-time sensor data and predictive analytics."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance DeviceLifecycleManagementInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Standardized management of digital twin instances and their lifecycle, including device representation and runtime synchronization."
]

instance ImmersiveMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Interactive 3D visualization of building operations enabling facility managers to monitor and simulate real-time performance metrics."
]

instance PredictiveSimulationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Forecasts of building performance (energy consumption, thermal behavior) derived from physics-based or data-driven simulation models."
]

instance DeploymentAutomationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Automated generation of runtime configurations for Eclipse Hono/Ditto based on BIM model analysis, reducing manual deployment efforts."
]

instance ControlLogicConfigurationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Domain-specific configurations for Building Control Systems embedded within BIM models, defining operational attributes and control policies."
]

instance ModelEnrichmentInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Validation and consistency checks for BIM models enriched with runtime metadata (device IDs, control logic) for DT integration."
]

instance AdaptiveControlPolicyInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Reinforcement learning-derived control policies for adaptive building systems (e.g., lighting, HVAC) optimized for energy efficiency and occupant comfort."
]

instance EnergyOptimizationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated optimization of energy consumption through dynamic adjustments to building systems (e.g., lighting dimming, HVAC setpoints) based on real-time data."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

// C1: Environment (AECO Infrastructure)
instance BuildingDigitalTwinEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "BIM-centric, model-driven Digital Twin framework for AECO infrastructure targeting buildings and operational systems throughout the life cycle."
    base:contains BimModel, RuntimeSensorData, ControlLogicModel, SimulationModel, VisualizationAssets
    base:contains ModelDrivenEngineeringEnabler, EclipseHonoEnabler, EclipseDittoEnabler, UnrealEngine5Enabler, BimToolingEnabler
    base:contains OccupancySensor, TemperatureHumiditySensor, LuminositySensor, EnergyMeter
    base:contains LightingDimmerActuator, HvacDamperActuator, MotorizedShadeActuator
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The virtual-to-physical interactions are enabled through **automated control signal generation** and **bidirectional communication** via Eclipse Hono/Ditto. The DT processes real-time data and generates control commands (e.g., lighting adjustments, HVAC setpoints) that are transmitted back to the physical Building Control Systems (BCS). The framework supports **runtime configuration management**, allowing dynamic adjustments to control policies without redeployment. For example, the TwinLight project demonstrates how BIM-embedded control semantics are used to automate commissioning and bidirectional communication between virtual models and physical lighting systems."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The twinning time scale is characterized by **real-time synchronization** between the Physical Twin and Digital Twin, with data exchange occurring at **sub-second to second-level intervals** depending on sensor and system configurations. The framework supports **iterative refinement** of control policies (e.g., via reinforcement learning in BOREALIS), where adjustments are made dynamically based on live sensor data. While specific latency metrics are not detailed, the emphasis is on **low-latency, high-frequency updates** to ensure the DT remains an accurate reflection of the physical system."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation is orchestrated as a **service-oriented architecture** with the following components:
  1. **BIM Core**: The central semantic model integrating static and dynamic building data.
  2. **Middleware Layer**: Eclipse Hono/Ditto for real-time data exchange and device management.
  3. **Control Layer**: Embedded control logic (e.g., TwinLight’s lighting control semantics) and reinforcement learning models (e.g., BOREALIS’s adaptive policies).
  4. **Visualization Layer**: Unreal Engine 5 for immersive monitoring and simulation.
  5. **Service Layer**: Modular services (e.g., predictive analytics, automated commissioning) integrated via standardized extension points.
  The constellation supports **bidirectional data flow** between the physical and virtual worlds, with each layer contributing to the DT’s entanglement (measured via ODTE)."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT operates across the **entire building life cycle**, covering phases from **initial design** (BIM modeling), **construction** (clash detection, coordination), **operation** (real-time monitoring, control), to **refurbishment and adaptations**. The framework ensures continuity by leveraging BIM’s semantic richness for design and extending it with runtime capabilities for operational phases, as demonstrated in the **Living Lab case study**."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity is evaluated using the **Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric**, which measures the alignment between the digital and physical systems. The framework includes **model validation** steps to ensure semantic consistency before deployment. While **semantic drift** (divergence over time) is acknowledged in related work, the current implementation focuses on **real-time synchronization** and **automated data normalization** to maintain coherence."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The DT uses **Eclipse Hono** for IoT connectivity and **Ditto** for digital twin management, enabling **real-time data exchange** via standardized protocols. The framework supports **bidirectional communication** between physical assets and the DT, but specific protocols (e.g., MQTT, HTTP/JSON) are not detailed in the provided documents. The focus is on **interoperability** and **automated endpoint configuration** from BIM metadata."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "The framework emphasizes **standardized integration mechanisms** to enable interoperability across heterogeneous systems. While specific APIs (e.g., IFC, bSDD) are not mentioned, the use of **Eclipse IoT tools** (Hono, Ditto) and **BIM as a semantic backbone** facilitates cross-platform compatibility. The goal is to support **modular service integration** and **scalable deployment** across AECO workflows."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The framework adheres to **AECO-specific standards** such as **BIM** and leverages **Eclipse IoT** tools (Hono, Ditto) for interoperability. While specific standards (e.g., ISO/IEC 23247, OASIS) are not cited, the use of **model-driven engineering (MDE)** and **standardized extension points** ensures alignment with domain-wide best practices for DT deployment."
]
